column1: # Source: Doss M. 2018. "Comment on '30 years follow-up and increased risks of breast
#   cancer and leukaemia after long-term low-dose-rate radiation exposure'." Br J Cancer 118:e10.
#   Recomputes the external Standardized Incidence Ratio (SIR = observed / expected) from
# published_sir / published_ci* are Doss's printed values; the pipeline recomputes the CI
#   from observed counts (Byar/exact Poisson) as a validation check.
